context: Petersen Woodworks guidance for shop materials and craft-fair travel costs.

validation_rules.notes: Lumber and finishing supplies tied to a confirmed commission
validation_rules.rule: Material costs under $150 reimbursed the same week

validation_rules.notes: Larger hardwood orders for craft-fair inventory
validation_rules.rule: Material costs over $150 reviewed before reimbursement

validation_rules.notes: Mileage to lumber yards and the St. Michael's craft fair
validation_rules.rule: Mileage reimbursed at the standard IRS rate
